requirement_topic.en: SIGET and Distributor Grid Interconnection — 60 Hz / 120-240 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: SIGET 及配电公司并网——60 Hz / 120-240 V 参数
requirement_topic.zht: SIGET 及配電公司併網——60 Hz / 120-240 V 參數

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverter projects in El Salvador must be reviewed through the applicable SIGET electricity framework and the serving distribution company, such as CAESS, DELSUR, EEO, CLESA, or B&D, before energisation. The practical technical package should identify the inverter model, 60 Hz firmware profile, voltage and frequency trip windows, reconnection timing, anti-islanding settings, power-quality limits, metering arrangement, and commissioning lock method. El Salvador uses an Americas-style 120/240 V, 60 Hz distribution environment, so inverter grid-protection settings must be validated for 60 Hz operation and local service voltage, not for China 50 Hz / 220-380 V defaults.
summary.zh: 萨尔瓦多并网光伏逆变器项目在送电前，须按适用的 SIGET 电力框架并通过服务配电公司（如 CAESS、DELSUR、EEO、CLESA 或 B&D）审查。实际技术包应列明逆变器型号、60 Hz 固件配置、电压和频率跳闸窗口、重连时间、防孤岛参数、电能质量限值、计量安排和调试锁定方法。萨尔瓦多采用美洲式 120/240 V、60 Hz 配电环境，因此逆变器并网保护参数必须按 60 Hz 运行和当地服务电压验证，而不是按中国 50 Hz / 220-380 V 默认值验证。
summary.zht: 薩爾瓦多併網光伏逆變器項目在送電前，須按適用的 SIGET 電力框架並通過服務配電公司（如 CAESS、DELSUR、EEO、CLESA 或 B&D）審查。實際技術包應列明逆變器型號、60 Hz 韌體配置、電壓和頻率跳脫窗口、重連時間、防孤島參數、電能品質限值、計量安排和調試鎖定方法。薩爾瓦多採用美洲式 120/240 V、60 Hz 配電環境，因此逆變器併網保護參數必須按 60 Hz 運行和當地服務電壓驗證，而不是按中國 50 Hz / 220-380 V 預設值驗證。

standards_or_laws: SIGET electricity-sector and distributor interconnection requirements for grid-tied generation
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Project distributor requirements from CAESS, DELSUR, EEO, CLESA, or B&D

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, and domestic anti-islanding or grid-protection test reports. These documents are prepared for China grid conditions, normally 50 Hz with 220/380 V low-voltage references under Chinese practice. They do not demonstrate that the shipped inverter has a locked, tested El Salvador 60 Hz / 120-240 V profile or that SIGET and the relevant distributor will accept the equipment for interconnection.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括 GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408 以及国内防孤岛或并网保护测试报告。这些文件按中国电网条件准备，通常为 50 Hz，并以中国实践中的 220/380 V 低压参考为基础。它们不能证明发运逆变器具备已锁定、已测试的萨尔瓦多 60 Hz / 120-240 V 配置，也不能证明 SIGET 及相关配电公司会接受该设备并网。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括 GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408 以及國內防孤島或併網保護測試報告。這些文件按中國電網條件準備，通常為 50 Hz，並以中國實務中的 220/380 V 低壓參考為基礎。它們不能證明發運逆變器具備已鎖定、已測試的薩爾瓦多 60 Hz / 120-240 V 配置，也不能證明 SIGET 及相關配電公司會接受該設備併網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: a China 50 Hz grid package does not prove El Salvador interconnection readiness. Exporters should prepare a distributor-facing package with the exact 60 Hz firmware profile, IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence where required, settings tables, commissioning procedure, and model-specific test reports. Any factory default made for China should be reconfigured, documented, and retested where the parameter change affects anti-islanding, frequency response, voltage trip thresholds, or reconnection behavior.
gap.zh: 差距：中国 50 Hz 并网资料不能证明已具备萨尔瓦多并网条件。出口商应准备面向配电公司的文件包，包括准确的 60 Hz 固件配置、IEC 62116 防孤岛证据、适用时的 IEC 61727 公用电网接口证据、参数表、调试程序和型号特定测试报告。任何针对中国出厂默认值的配置，如影响防孤岛、频率响应、电压跳闸阈值或重连行为，均应重新配置、形成记录，并在必要时重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國 50 Hz 併網資料不能證明已具備薩爾瓦多併網條件。出口商應準備面向配電公司的文件包，包括準確的 60 Hz 韌體配置、IEC 62116 防孤島證據、適用時的 IEC 61727 公用電網介面證據、參數表、調試程序和型號特定測試報告。任何針對中國出廠預設值的配置，如影響防孤島、頻率響應、電壓跳脫閾值或重連行為，均應重新配置、形成記錄，並在必要時重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid energisation where SIGET rules and the serving distributor require interconnection review and acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence may satisfy China domestic project requirements but does not transfer automatically to El Salvador's 60 Hz distributor review

source.publisher: Superintendencia General de Electricidad y Telecomunicaciones (SIGET)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat SIGET and the serving distributor as project gates. Do not ship a China 50 Hz / 220-380 V default profile as if it were ready for El Salvador; validate and document the 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid profile before interconnection submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 SIGET 及服务配电公司视为项目门槛。不要将中国 50 Hz / 220-380 V 默认配置视为可直接用于萨尔瓦多；在并网提交前，应验证并记录 60 Hz / 120-240 V 电网配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 SIGET 及服務配電公司視為項目門檻。不要將中國 50 Hz / 220-380 V 預設配置視為可直接用於薩爾瓦多；在併網提交前，應驗證並記錄 60 Hz / 120-240 V 電網配置。

requirement_topic.en: Distributed Generation and Net-Billing Documentation — SIGET / Distributor Project Gate
requirement_topic.zh: 分布式发电和净结算文件——SIGET / 配电公司项目门槛
requirement_topic.zht: 分散式發電和淨結算文件——SIGET / 配電公司項目門檻

summary.en: El Salvador has a practical project pathway for distributed renewable generation and net-billing style arrangements through the electricity regulator and the serving distributor. For inverter compliance, the project file should support the interconnection study, metering design, protection coordination, commissioning checks, and any distributor model-acceptance review. The inverter evidence should therefore be tied to the actual project voltage, phase configuration, export limits, and 60 Hz protection settings, not only to a generic international certificate.
summary.zh: 萨尔瓦多通过电力监管机构和服务配电公司存在分布式可再生能源发电及净结算式安排的实际项目路径。就逆变器合规而言，项目文件应支持并网研究、计量设计、保护配合、调试检查以及任何配电公司型号接收审查。因此，逆变器证据应对应实际项目电压、相数配置、上网功率限制和 60 Hz 保护参数，而不仅是通用国际证书。
summary.zht: 薩爾瓦多通過電力監管機構和服務配電公司存在分散式可再生能源發電及淨結算式安排的實際項目路徑。就逆變器合規而言，項目文件應支持併網研究、計量設計、保護配合、調試檢查以及任何配電公司型號接收審查。因此，逆變器證據應對應實際項目電壓、相數配置、上網功率限制和 60 Hz 保護參數，而不僅是通用國際證書。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence where required by project specifications

summary.en: China distributed PV approvals and inverter certificates are issued under Chinese policy, grid-company, and GB/T / NB/T frameworks. They can be useful engineering references, but they do not create an El Salvador interconnection approval, distributor acceptance, metering approval, or net-billing entitlement.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏审批和逆变器证书依据中国政策、电网公司及 GB/T / NB/T 框架签发。它们可作为工程参考资料，但不会产生萨尔瓦多并网批准、配电公司接收、计量批准或净结算资格。
summary.zht: 中國分散式光伏審批和逆變器證書依據中國政策、電網公司及 GB/T / NB/T 框架簽發。它們可作為工程參考資料，但不會產生薩爾瓦多併網批准、配電公司接收、計量批准或淨結算資格。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic distributed-generation approvals are not portable. For El Salvador, confirm the specific distributor process, export or self-consumption arrangement, metering requirements, protection study requirements, and accepted inverter evidence before committing equipment. The same inverter family may need different settings or evidence depending on whether the project is single-phase 120/240 V, split-phase, or three-phase service.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内分布式发电审批不可移植。进入萨尔瓦多前，应确认具体配电公司流程、上网或自发自用安排、计量要求、保护研究要求及可接受的逆变器证据。即使属于同一逆变器系列，项目为单相 120/240 V、分相或三相供电时，也可能需要不同参数或证据。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內分散式發電審批不可移植。進入薩爾瓦多前，應確認具體配電公司流程、上網或自發自用安排、計量要求、保護研究要求及可接受的逆變器證據。即使屬於同一逆變器系列，項目為單相 120/240 V、分相或三相供電時，也可能需要不同參數或證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a grid-tied distributed-generation or net-billing project requires SIGET and distributor processing before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: China distributed PV approvals apply only inside the Chinese grid and policy framework

source.publisher: Superintendencia General de Electricidad y Telecomunicaciones (SIGET)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm the SIGET and distributor project route before treating an inverter as eligible for distributed generation or net billing. Chinese distributed PV approvals do not substitute for El Salvador interconnection, metering, protection, or commissioning acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在将逆变器视为适用于分布式发电或净结算前，应确认 SIGET 及配电公司的项目路径。中国分布式光伏审批不能替代萨尔瓦多并网、计量、保护或调试验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在將逆變器視為適用於分散式發電或淨結算前，應確認 SIGET 及配電公司的項目路徑。中國分散式光伏審批不能替代薩爾瓦多併網、計量、保護或調試驗收。
